name: mcp-sql-sanitizer
description: Validate SQL produced by the agent (for the keyword_db tool) before execution. Block injections, enforce column allowlist from cedar policy 03.
rationale: MCP keyword_db tool is read-only for the agent's purposes. Any DDL or write attempt is either a bug or an injection. The cedar policy 03-sql-column-allowlist enforces the column allowlist; this guardrail enforces the statement-shape allowlist.
